commands.author: lukeboyett
commands.command: please re-review. note on the other two items in your verdict: - **exact-head real-behavior-proof**: the proof i posted in the pr body was captured from the patched gateway running the *intended* behavior (cron awareness hidden, owner-auth downgrade active for trusted=false). it is reproducible against `ef3e202be1`. happy to refresh if a maintainer wants me to re-run with the current head string in the log lines. - **dirty/rebase**: this is a `changelog.md` unreleased-section conflict caused by upstream churn. will rebase on maintainer request — leaving it as-is for now to avoid burning rebase cycles while review is still active.
commands.freeform_prompt: please re-review. Note on the other two items in your verdict: - **Exact-head real-behavior-proof**: the proof I posted in the PR body was captured from the patched gateway running the *intended* behavior (cron awareness hidden, owner-auth downgrade active for trusted=false). It is reproducible against `ef3e202be1`. Happy to refresh if a maintainer wants me to re-run with the current head string in the log lines. - **DIRTY/rebase**: this is a `CHANGELOG.md` Unreleased-section conflict caused by upstream churn. Will rebase on maintainer request — leaving it as-is for now to avoid burning rebase cycles while review is still active.
